title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind announced Gemini 3, featuring upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The model is designed for building agentic applications and is integrated with Vertex AI for deployment and scaling.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech covers the announcement of Gemini 3 from Google DeepMind, focusing on upgraded model reasoning, an expanded context window, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The release targets agentic application development, with integration into Vertex AI for deployment and scaling. The concrete takeaways: improvements to long-context reasoning and multimodal capabilities, and a positioning of the model for agentic workflows rather than single-turn tasks.
